protocolVersion.description: Version of the cross-runtime envelope contract.

requestId.description: Correlation identifier scoped to the transport exchange.

kind.description: Semantic payload kind such as workflow.submit or agent.register. The kind identifies an explicit object or action, not an embedding-only payload.

payload.description: Transport-safe explicit semantic payload emitted by the gateway or core. Embeddings or vector fragments, if present, are supplemental rather than authoritative control inputs.

metadata.description: Opaque metadata preserved across protocol adapters. Metadata may annotate canonical objects but does not replace them.
